vulnerability.reference: User tendency to anthropomorphize voice assistants makes them susceptible to misinterpreting emotional tone.
vulnerability.generated: Voice assistants lack a confirmation step for emotionally-toned edits, so users cannot detect mismatches before they cause confusion.

impact.reference: Mismatched emotional cues reduce user trust and satisfaction, decreasing long-term engagement with voice AI.
impact.generated: Users suffer confusion and miscommunication when emotional cues in edited speech contradict the intended message.

dose_response.reference: Instruction-following speech editing misinterpretation enables unintended emotional cues in voice responses, which in virtual assistant interactions exposes users to mismatched emotional signals, reducing trust and engagement.
dose_response.generated: Instruction-following speech editing producing mismatched edits from misinterpreted instructions, when users interact with voice assistants lacking confirmation for emotionally-toned edits, leaves mismatches undetected, leading to user confusion and miscommunication when emotional cues contradict the intended message.
